# Aitotech — llms.txt
# Answer-engine / AI crawler context (AEO). See https://llmstxt.org/

> AitoTech is an enterprise AI automation company based in Delhi, India.
> Aksh is AitoTech's AI coding platform (Aksh Studio + Aksh Coder), powered by Omni.

## Company
- Name: AitoTech
- Website: https://aitotech.in
- Email: info@aitotech.in
- Focus: Enterprise AI automation, workflow orchestration, custom AI systems

## Product: Aksh (launching soon)
- URL: https://aitotech.in/aksh
- What: India's AI coding platform — browser IDE (Aksh Studio), AI assistant (Omni), cloud projects
- Waitlist: https://aitotech.in/aksh#waitlist
- No download required at launch — browser-first, thin client
- Hosting: E2E Networks India (production target)
- Model: Omni (single user-facing AI brain)

## Key pages
- Home: https://aitotech.in/
- Aksh launch: https://aitotech.in/aksh
- Services: https://aitotech.in/services
- Contact: https://aitotech.in/contact

## FAQ (Aksh)
- Q: What is Aksh?
  A: Aksh is an AI coding platform by AitoTech with Aksh Studio (browser IDE) and Omni AI for coding in English and Hinglish.
- Q: Do I need to download Aksh?
  A: No. Aksh runs in the browser. Optional Cursor integration uses the Omni API.
- Q: How do I get early access?
  A: Join the waitlist at https://aitotech.in/aksh#waitlist
